name: Abtion AdonisJS App
description: AdonisJS application from the Abtion template

PUBLIC_URL.description: URL of the deployed application. Auto-generated.

WEBAUTHN_RP_ID.description: Your Scalingo app hostname, e.g. my-app-staging.osc-fr1.scalingo.io without the https:// prefix

WEBAUTHN_ORIGIN.description: Full origin URL of the deployed application. Auto-generated.

WEBAUTHN_RP_NAME.description: Human-friendly app name, e.g. My App Staging

SMTP_HOST.description: SMTP host. Use sandbox-smtp.mailtrap.io for staging.

SMTP_USERNAME.description: SMTP username. Get from Mailtrap sandbox inbox credentials.

SMTP_PASSWORD.description: SMTP password. Get from Mailtrap sandbox inbox credentials.
